heading: Benefit amount
label: 1005 Benefit amount
text: The benefit under this subchapter payable to a qualified individual for any month shall be in an amount equal to 75 percent of the Federal benefit rate under subchapter XVI for the month, reduced by the amount of the qualified individual’s benefit income for the month.
notes: Prior ProvisionsFor prior provisions, see note set out under .section 1001 of this title
